name: Ceremony brick closure
intent: Config always loads or is sanctionedly recoverable. Members: TASK-071 (FGAP-096 config repair path), FGAP-106 (remediation hint in unresolvable-chain error), TASK-055 (update pre-flight dirty-check). Lane A spine position 3: gated on MILE-004.
goal: An invalid or lagging config recovers through a sanctioned CLI path that validates the result; unresolvable-chain errors name write-schema-migration and the missing edge; update refuses to run over an uncommitted substrate.
